title: Zac Fulton

{{Short description|Australian rugby league footballer}} {{Use dmy dates|date=January 2024}} {{Use Australian English|date=January 2024}} {{Infobox rugby league biography |name = Zac Fulton |fullname = Zac Fulton |image = ZAC FULTON.jpg |imagesize = |birth_date = {{birth date and age|2001|08|14|df=y}} |birth_place = [[Sydney, New South Wales]], Australia |height = {{convert|1.83|m|ftin|abbr=on|order=flip}} |weight = {{convert|95|kg|stlb|abbr=on|order=flip}} |position = {{rlp|SR|CE|LF}} |club1 = [[Manly Warringah Sea Eagles|Manly Sea Eagles]] |year1start = 2022 |year1end = 23 |appearances1 = 1 |tries1 = 1 |goals1 = 0 |fieldgoals1 = 0 |points1 = 0 | club2 = {{nowrap|[[Bradford Bulls]]}} | year2start = 2024 | year2end = present | appearances2 = 71 | tries2 = 23 | goals2 = 0 | fieldgoals2 = 0 | points2 = 92 |teamA = {{nowrap|[[Indigenous All-Stars (rugby league)|Indigenous All Stars]]}} |yearAstart = 2024 |yearAend = |appearancesA = 1 |triesA = 0 |goalsA = 0 |fieldgoalsA = 0 |pointsA = 0 |retired = |source = |updated = 27 May 2026 | module = {{infobox person | embed = yes | father = [[Scott Fulton]] | mother = | spouse = | education = | alma_mater = | relatives = [[Brett Fulton]] (uncle)
[[Bob Fulton]] (grandfather) }} }} '''Zac Fulton''' (born 14 August 2001) is an Australian [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|sr}} forward for the [[Bradford Bulls]] in the [[Super League]]. ==Background== Fulton made history by being the first third generation of his family to play first grade at the one club, being the son of [[Scott Fulton|Scott]] and grandson of [[The Immortals (rugby league)|Rugby league Immortal]], [[Bob Fulton|Bob]].{{cite web|url=https://www.smh.com.au/sport/nrl/family-history-three-generations-at-one-club-an-nrl-first-as-fulton-tipped-for-debut-20220727-p5b52f.html |title=Family history: Three generations at one club an NRL first as Fulton tabbed for debut |publisher=Sydney Morning Herald |first=Adrian |last=Proszenko |date=27 July 2022}} He is of [[British people|British]] and part [[Aboriginal Australians|Aboriginal]] heritage, specifically [[English people|English]] and [[Australian Aboriginal]] descent. ==Playing career== ===Manly-Warringah Sea Eagles=== Fulton made his first grade debut in round 20 of the [[2022 NRL season]] for [[Manly-Warringah Sea Eagles|Manly]] against the [[Sydney Roosters]].{{cite web|url=https://www.nrl.com/news/2022/07/26/nrl-team-lists-round-20/ |title=NRL Round 20 team lists |publisher=NRL.com |date=26 July 2022}} ===Bradford Bulls=== On 5 March 2024 it was reported that he had signed for [[Bradford Bulls|Bradford]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on a one-year deal.{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=5 Mar 2024|author=Drew Darbyshire|title=Bradford Bulls sign NRL youngster who is the grandson of an Immortal|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/bradford-bulls-sign-nrl-youngster-zac-fulton-who-is-grandson-of-an-immortal}} On 5 December, Fulton re-signed with the club on a two year deal.{{Cite web |last=Chalk |first=Ethan Lee |date=2024-12-04 |title=Ex-Manly forward lands new contract |url=https://www.zerotackle.com/ex-manly-forward-lands-new-contract-217595/ |access-date=2024-12-06 |website=Zero Tackle |language=en-US}} ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[https://www.seaeagles.com.au/teams/telstra-premiership/manly-warringah-sea-eagles/zac-fulton/ Manly-Warringah profile] {{Webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220728110129/https://www.seaeagles.com.au/teams/telstra-premiership/manly-warringah-sea-eagles/zac-fulton/ |date=28 July 2022 }} {{Bradford
